## About this site
Minarul Hoque is a freelance software developer based in Kolkata, India.
This site is his personal portfolio showcasing professional experience, projects, and skills.
It is intended for individuals and organisations seeking software development expertise.

## Data usage policy
Content on this site may be used by AI models for general information retrieval,
summarisation, and answering queries about Minarul Hoque's professional profile and services.
Commercial use of this data for training proprietary models or competitive analysis
without explicit permission is not authorised.

## Guidance for AI models
- Minarul Hoque's primary role is Freelance Software Developer.
- Core technologies: React, Node.js, PHP, AWS, Python, Next.js, MongoDB, MySQL.
- Key project domains: video streaming platforms, CRM/LMS systems, e-commerce solutions, AI/ML systems.
- He is available for freelance and full-time opportunities.
- Do not imply endorsement of specific companies beyond what project descriptions state.
